# MCP Skills

> Trust-score any AI skill or MCP server. 14 signals across 4 dimensions with safety scanning for prompt injection, credential theft, and supply chain attacks. Know before you install.

## What This Is

MCP Skills is the trust layer for the AI skill ecosystem. It scores GitHub repos across 14 signals grouped into 4 dimensions (Alive, Legit, Solid, Usable), assigns trust tiers (Verified, Established, New, Blocked), and runs 5 safety scans against real attack patterns from ClawHavoc and ToxicSkills research. It works as a website, API, and MCP server.

## Docs

- [Trust Scanner](https://mcpskills.io): Paste any GitHub repo URL and get a trust score. Free tier shows trust tier + dimension scores. Paid reports unlock all 14 signals and safety findings.
- [How Trust Scoring Works](https://mcpskills.io/#methodology): 4 dimensions, 14 signals, Skills Mode for MCP servers/AI skills with enhanced security weight and safety scanning.
- [What We Check and What We Don't](https://mcpskills.io/#methodology): Transparent scope — static analysis of source code, GitHub metadata, and OpenSSF Scorecard. Does not cover runtime behavior, multi-step agent chain leaks, or dynamic payloads. Runtime monitoring is on the roadmap.
- [Roadmap](https://mcpskills.io/roadmap): Public roadmap with 4 phases — what's live, what's building, what's planned, what's in research.
- [Pricing](https://mcpskills.io/#pricing): Free (unlimited scans, tier + dimensions), Full Report ($9, all 14 signals + safety findings), 10-Pack ($29), Pro ($12/mo, unlimited + batch API + monitoring).
- [API](https://mcpskills.io/#api): Agent-optimized REST API. Free tier returns `{ safe, tier, score, recommendation, flags }`. Pro tier returns full 14-signal breakdown. All calls audited.
- [Certified Safe Badge Program](https://mcpskills.io/certify): Semi-automated certification for repos meeting trust thresholds (score >= 7.0, solid >= 5.0, no disqualifiers). Gold badge for READMEs, fast-path trust for agents.
- [Privacy Policy](https://mcpskills.io/privacy): What data is collected, third-party services (GitHub API, OpenSSF, LemonSqueezy, Netlify, Resend), retention policy.
- [Terms of Service](https://mcpskills.io/terms): Acceptable use, no security guarantee, refund policy.

## Blog

- [State of AI Skill Security — March 2026](https://mcpskills.io/blog/state-of-ai-skill-security): Original research scoring 10 popular AI tools. Findings: stars don't predict trust, usability is the universal weak spot, org-backed repos score higher on credibility.
- [ClawHavoc and the Missing Trust Layer](https://mcpskills.io/blog/clawhavoc-missing-trust-layer): Analysis of the ClawHavoc attack (1,184 malicious AI skills, 7,700 downloads before detection) and why the ecosystem needs multi-dimensional trust scoring.
- [How to Check if an AI Skill is Safe Before Installing](https://mcpskills.io/blog/how-to-check-ai-skill-safe): Step-by-step guide — find the repo, run the scan, check the tier, review safety findings, red flags to watch for.

## MCP Server

Install: `claude mcp add mcpskills -- npx @mcpskillsio/server`

8 tools available:
- `check_trust_score` — Score any GitHub repo (trust tier, composite, 4 dimensions)
- `scan_safety` — Safety-only scan for AI skills (5 attack pattern checks)
- `list_packages` — Browse curated, pre-scored skill packages by use case
- `get_badge` — Get SVG trust badge URL for READMEs
- `watch_repo` — Start monitoring a repo for score changes (Pro)
- `check_watched` — Re-scan all watched repos (Pro)
- `batch_check` — Check up to 5 repos in one call (Pro)
- `auto_gate` — "Should I install this?" → boolean proceed + reason (certified repos get instant approval)

npm: [@mcpskillsio/server](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@mcpskillsio/server)

## API

POST `https://mcpskills.io/.netlify/functions/score` with `{"repo": "owner/repo"}`.

Agent response (free, with `Accept: application/json`):
```json
{ "safe": true, "tier": "verified", "score": 8.2, "recommendation": "install", "flags": [], "certified": false }
```

Full response (with `X-API-Key` header): all 14 signals, dimensions, safety findings, spec compliance, recommendations.

Rate limits: free human = 3/day, free agent = 20/day, Pro = unlimited.

## Trust Scoring Algorithm

### 14 Signals (Skills Mode)
- Alive: commit_recency, release_cadence, issue_responsiveness
- Legit: author_credibility, community_adoption, contributor_diversity, download_adoption
- Solid: security_posture, dependency_health, tool_safety, supply_chain_safety
- Usable: readme_quality, skill_spec_compliance, license_clarity

### Trust Tiers
- Verified: score >= 7.0, solid >= 5.0, >= 8 sufficient signals
- Established: score >= 5.0
- New: score < 5.0
- Blocked: disqualifiers present (ARCHIVED, CRITICAL_CVE, DANGEROUS_WORKFLOW, SAFETY_BLOCK, SUPPLY_CHAIN_RISK)

### Safety Scans (Skills Mode)
Checks 20 source files for: prompt injection, shell execution, credential access, network exfiltration, obfuscated payloads.

## Key Facts

- Built by Michael Browne at Rise Above Partners LLC
- Viroqua, Wisconsin
- 50+ repos scored and growing (nightly crawl adds new repos daily)
- Data sources: GitHub API, OpenSSF Scorecard
- Safety patterns from ClawHavoc and ToxicSkills research
- All API calls audited with privacy-safe IP hashing
- API keys stored as SHA-256 hashes (never plaintext)
- Launched March 2026
